description_long: This object consists of three wooden barrels, two standing upright side by side and one resting horizontally on top of them. Each barrel is constructed from vertical wooden staves bound by several metallic hoops, giving them a classic, rustic appearance. The wood is medium brown with visible grain and texture, while the metal bands are a dull, weathered gray, suggesting age and durability. The barrels have slightly bulging sides and flat, circular ends, with the top barrel's end grain clearly visible. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the barrels appear to be empty, as the tops are open. The overall arrangement suggests storage or decorative use in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A group of three classic wooden barrels with metal hoops, two upright and one laid horizontally on top, showing weathered wood and metal textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open tops of the two upright barrels and the circular end of the horizontal barrel above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved sides and metal hoops of all three barrels, with the horizontal barrel resting atop the two vertical ones.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open tops of the upright barrels and the end of the horizontal barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the curved sides and metal hoops, with the horizontal barrel on top.
